description_long: A group of red apples is arranged on a square woven mat, with most apples gathered in a dark bowl and a few scattered on a piece of burlap cloth. Several apples are whole, while a few are sliced to reveal their white interior and seeds. The apples have a glossy, smooth skin with a natural red hue and subtle yellow-green highlights. The bowl is round and dark, contrasting with the lighter, textured mat and cloth. The mat has a checkered, woven pattern and covers a flat surface. The overall scene suggests a rustic, market-style display suitable for an outdoor urban setting.
description: A cluster of glossy red apples, some sliced, rests in a dark bowl on a woven mat with burlap cloth.
description_view_0: Several whole and sliced apples are visible, with the bowl and burlap cloth central on the mat.
description_view_1: More sliced apples are visible on the mat, and the bowl appears fuller from this angle.
description_view_2: The bowl of apples is prominent, with fewer apples visible outside the bowl.
description_view_3: The bowl dominates the view, with apples mostly inside and a few slices on the cloth.
attribute_placement_or_context: in a bowl on a woven mat
